message:
feat(io): add genfromtxt_full with usecols, skip_footer, and max_rows support

Extend genfromtxt with a new genfromtxt_full function that supports
additional NumPy-compatible parameters: usecols for column selection,
skip_footer for trimming trailing rows, and max_rows for capping the
number of rows read. Includes tests for each parameter individually
and in combination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
